_metadata.name: Passive OSINT Subdomain Expansion
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that combines theHarvester, Amass, and Shuffledns to expand a single root domain into validated subdomains and live HTTP assets.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Passive OSINT Subdomain Expansion
manifest.description: Expand one authorized root domain with passive OSINT sources, bounded Shuffledns validation/bruteforce, and live HTTP probing.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Passive OSINT Subdomain Expansion
graph.description: Bounded passive recon expansion workflow for one authorized root domain.

runtimeInputs.label: Root domain
runtimeInputs.description: Single authorized root domain such as example.com.

runtimeInputs.label: Known subdomains
runtimeInputs.description: Optional in-scope subdomains from prior recon, imports, or program documentation.

runtimeInputs.label: Bruteforce wordlist
runtimeInputs.description: Small DNS label wordlist for bounded Shuffledns bruteforce, such as www, api, app, staging.

runtimeInputs.label: Scan intensity
runtimeInputs.description: Use safe, normal, or thorough. Safe keeps passive expansion and DNS queries tightly bounded.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, rate limits, and validation notes to include in the report.
